name: MSHTA Spawning Windows Shell or Scripting Tools Detected
description: Execution of a Windows command shell or scripting tool by mshta.exe, highly indicative of malicious activity for initial access, defense evasion, or indirect code execution.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: ParentImage
parameters.description: The full path to the parent process (mshta.exe).

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The full path to the spawned child process (e.g., cmd.exe, powershell.exe).

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line of the spawned child process.

parameters.name: ParentCommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line of the mshta.exe parent process.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The hostname of the system where the process was created.

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.description: The Sysmon rule name that triggered the alert, if available.
